case_title: WARDELL, LLOYD VS THE UCSF BUCHANAN DENTAL CENTER(MARTIN, GISELLEE)

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO MS. GISILLE MARTIN UCSF BUCHANAN DENTAL CENTER RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARDELL, LLOYD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE UCSF BUCHANAN DENTAL CENTER(MARTIN, GISELLEE) DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. PLTF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. PER PLTF'S EXHIBITS, PLTF IS ABLE TO HAVE FULL UPPER DENTURES W/O 2 GOLD TEETH REPLACED BY DENTI-CAL. PLTF DID NOT SUBMIT EVIDENCE THAT DEFT WAS REQUIRED TO PERFORM THE REQUESTED DENTAL WORK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WARDELL, LLOYD AS TO DEFENDANT THE UCSF BUCHANAN DENTAL CENTER(MARTIN, GISELLEE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE UCSF BUCHANAN DENTAL CENTER(MARTIN, GISELLEE)
